title: Fix url-validator SSRF test errors
description: Fix 33 unhandled rejection errors in test/security/url-validator.test.ts

stories.title: Fix url-validator async test errors
stories.description: Tests use validateUrl (async) but pass to expect().toThrow() without await, causing unhandled rejections. Convert sync tests to validateUrlSync, use mock dnsLookup for async path.
acceptanceCriteria: validateUrl receives dnsLookup as optional 3rd parameter (default: real lookup)
validateUrlSync used for all synchronous test cases
validateUrl with mock dnsLookup for async path tests
IPv6 loopback bypass bug fixed: localhost resolving to ::1 no longer blocked

stories.title: Vitest worktree decontamination
stories.description: vitest.config.ts exclude patterns don't cover root-level worktree-polymorphic-growing-quiche/
acceptanceCriteria: vitest.config.ts exclude has explicit entry for worktree-polymorphic-growing-quiche/
pnpm test shows decontaminated counts (vs baseline ~300 real failures)

stories.title: Remaining: generator-renderer.test.js async errors
stories.description: 21 errors from P5GeneratorLLM.generate() called without await in integration tests. Pre-existing issue, not blocking url-validator fix.
acceptanceCriteria: generator-renderer.test.js: 21 errors from async P5Generator.generate() without await
Fixing this requires converting ~21 test cases to async/await pattern
